design_requirement: Default to paraphrase; if direct text is used, keep each source at or below the row quote_limit and never exceed the project-wide 25-word/source ceiling.
why_it_matters: Prevents source cards from becoming copied passages or epigraphs.
verification: Quote-count audit before any final manuscript insertion.

design_requirement: Every card must show source title, author/organization, year or exact date, source ID, and page/section/slide reference.
why_it_matters: Keeps typographic cards evidentiary rather than decorative.
verification: Ledger row must include source_ids and provenance_needed before design.

design_requirement: Every card needs one short blocked-claims line, even when the visual is beautiful.
why_it_matters: Stops source-surface texture from laundering benchmark, safety, adoption, or economics claims.
verification: Compare card blocker to claims.tsv and source row notes.

design_requirement: If exact wording is not essential, use a house paraphrase and cite the source below it.
why_it_matters: Reduces rights risk while preserving primary-source visibility.
verification: Designer must mark direct_quote=no or direct_quote=yes.

design_requirement: Multi-source cards should use tiny labels or paraphrases, not multiple full quotations.
why_it_matters: Prevents a page from becoming a collage of copyrighted snippets.
verification: Limit multi-source cards to labels unless cleared individually.

design_requirement: Do not extract a phrase whose meaning depends on omitted caveats, task scope, model version, or date.
verification: Reviewer checks preceding/following paragraph or figure caption.

design_requirement: A source-excerpt card is not a source screenshot; screenshot slots need viewport, hash, rights note, and manifest row.
why_it_matters: Keeps planned cards from being counted as assets before capture.
verification: Only assets_manifest rows can count as available visuals.

design_requirement: Cards should use source-family color bands, small source metadata, and a visible claim-control footer; no hero-scale decorative quotation marks.
why_it_matters: Makes the object feel like evidence, not marketing.
verification: Design QA on mobile/print spread before promotion.

design_requirement: Dynamic docs, live leaderboards, product pages, and vendor posts must carry access date and snapshot/capture status.
why_it_matters: Prevents mutable pages from masquerading as stable historical evidence.
verification: Snapshot row or explicit snapshot-needed blocker required.

design_requirement: Source cards should fill under-illustrated mechanism chapters or replace weaker screenshots, not inflate the final 100 without selection review.
why_it_matters: Aligns with the I-0187 and I-0188 exhibit-balance work.
verification: Candidate must map to top-100 matrix reserve/replace decision before final placement.
